summary: Crisp soundboard recording of a stellar 1972 show featuring a haunting PITB, expansive Dark Star, and powerful Truckin' jam.
review: Both reviewers praise this performance as a highlight of the legendary 1972 year, singling out Jerry’s soaring tone on Playing In The Band, the kaleidoscopic Dark Star, an intense Truckin’ jam, and a soulful Sing Me Back Home. The updated soundboard source is described as crisp and well‑remastered, making the show highly enjoyable despite one reviewer finding Dark Star overly long.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are glowing (5 stars) and note excellent musical moments plus a high‑quality crisp soundboard recording; limited to two detailed reviews, so confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remastered with crystal‑clear clarity; no dropouts or muddiness mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong, flowing set with a powerful first half highlighted by PITB and an exploratory second half featuring Dark Star, followed by high‑energy Truckin' and a heartfelt close.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Haunting tone, frenzied wah‑wah work, silky guitar runs praised throughout.
band_member_comments.Bob: Sharp vocal accents noted especially during PITB.
